name: Grade 11 Outdoor Adventure — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for independent research, evaluation, and sophisticated disciplinary communication through Outdoor Adventure. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in independent research, evaluation, and sophisticated disciplinary communication through Outdoor Adventure.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about independent research, evaluation, and sophisticated disciplinary communication through Outdoor Adventure and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
